MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DEAN PETRULAKIS, Esq. of Law Offices of Dean Petrulakis (tel: 209-522-6600) for Plaintiff Janita Sam.
Atty. KEITH PATTERSON, Esq. of Smith, Kovama & Costello (tel: 510-267-7252) for Defendant Gloria Schlieser.
Atty. CASSANDRA FRANCOIS, Esq. of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP (tel: 415-981-5411) for Cross-Defendant Julio Bermudez.

Hearing Re: CROSS DEFENDANT JULIO BERMUDEZ's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to July 15, 2025, at 9:00 A.M. in Department 301. Parties are to meet and confer as to the discovery dispute at issue. If the parties can resolve the discovery dispute, they are to inform the court of the resolution. If the parties cannot resolve the discovery dispute, they may file an opposition and a reply to the motion thereof. The deadlines for the opposition and the reply will follow from the new hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Alyssa Pacheco, CSR# 13391 (tel: 209-679-3571 / email: apstenography@gmail.com). (301/CVA)
